ratingScale.label: Power Index
ratingScale.description: Versioned public ladder scale. Calibrated internal Elo remains the prediction source of truth.

scoreFamilies.label: Power Index
scoreFamilies.description: Predictive latent team-strength score; records are evidence, not the rank target.

scoreFamilies.label: Deserved Standing
scoreFamilies.description: Resume check based on scoped results, opponent strength, schedule, event weight, and current-roster validity.
